The following events took place in '''3958 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]]'''.

==Events==
*[[Griff Vao]] leaves [[Taris/Legends|Taris]] with [[Lena]], abandoning his young sister, [[Mission Vao|Mission]].<ref name="KotOR">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''</ref>
*[[Saul Karath]] defects to join the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]].<ref name="KotORCG">''[[Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide]]''</ref>

==Battles==
*[[Bombing of Telos IV]]<ref name="KotOR" /><ref name="KotORCG" />

==Deaths==
*[[Morgana Onasi]] on [[Telos IV]]<ref name="KotOR" />

==Sources==
*<!-- 2007-11-27 -->[[Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force (real-life book)|''Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force'']]
